metadata.demo: GTM Demo 9: CP Retrofit & Remaining-Life Assessment for Aging Structures

results.recommendation: CP system adequate. Remaining anode life: 33.2 years. Next inspection recommended in 5.0 years.
Anode depletion projected in 19.9 years. Install 51 retrofit anodes (10164 kg) to cover remaining 30 year design life.
Anode depletion projected in 14.3 years. Install 98 retrofit anodes (19414 kg) to cover remaining 30 year design life.
